AngelSAG Monster Engine - garagem

Generated files:
- angel.generated.json
- metadata.generated.ts
- faq.generated.ts
- schema.generated.ts
- routes.generated.ts
- index.generated.ts

Suggested usage folder:
src/lib/seo

Quick import:
import { getMetadataForPath, getSchemaForPath, getFaqForPath } from "@/lib/seo";

Note:
Adjust the "domain" field in projects.json if the real domain differs from the default fallback.
